seo.title: Luma Uni-1: Image Pricing, References and Editing | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Use Luma Uni-1 in MaxVideoAI for 2K text-to-image, source-image edits, multi-reference layouts, optional web-grounded visual research and MaxVideoAI display pricing.

overview: Luma Uni-1 is a 2K image generation and editing model in MaxVideoAI for still-image concepts, source edits, layout reasoning, multi-reference guidance and visual research. It is an image-only route.
pricingNotes: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing. Reference and edit examples include source/reference image counts where shown, and the exact app quote appears before generation.

hero.title: Luma Uni-1 - 2K image generation and editing
hero.intro: Create still images, edit a source image and guide layouts with references before selecting the best still for product, brand, storyboard or motion handoff work.

items.title: 2K concept stills from a visual brief
Source-image edits that preserve the main subject
Multi-reference product, layout and style guidance
Web-grounded visual research when context matters
Clean still handoff before motion work

technicalOverview.label: References
technicalOverview.body: Text requests can use multiple references; edits use the first image as source plus optional references

technicalOverview.label: Aspect ratios
technicalOverview.body: Wide, square, portrait and extended ratios on text-to-image

technicalOverview.label: Styles
technicalOverview.body: Auto and manga style controls where exposed

technicalOverview.label: Output format
technicalOverview.body: PNG or JPEG in the active image workspace

technicalOverview.label: Pricing
technicalOverview.body: Public copy uses MaxVideoAI display pricing, not lower provider-cost promises

promptStructure.title: Prompt mini-guide
promptStructure.quote: Artifact + subject + layout + style + reference roles + what to preserve or change.
promptStructure.description: Uni-1 works best when references have explicit roles. State which image controls product shape, style, palette, layout or typography direction, then describe the still you want.
steps: Name the target asset and use case.
Describe subject, composition, lighting and style.
For edits, separate preserve instructions from changes.
Assign one role per reference image.
Use web search only when current visual context is useful.
Review text, labels and small details before using the image downstream.

tips.title: Tips and limits
items: Use Uni-1 for still images only.
Use references deliberately instead of uploading unrelated inspiration.
Do not assume typography is perfect; inspect exact words and labels.
For source edits, make preservation constraints explicit.
Use the app quote as the customer-facing price.

prompts.title: Product concept still
prompts.prompt: A 2K studio still of a matte white smart speaker on a warm concrete plinth, soft side light, clean label area, premium catalog composition, 16:9.

prompts.title: Source image edit
prompts.prompt: Preserve the product shape and logo hierarchy from the source image, replace the background with a calm studio tabletop, soften reflections, keep natural shadows.

prompts.title: Multi-reference layout
prompts.prompt: Use reference 1 for the product shape, reference 2 for color palette and reference 3 for layout rhythm. Create a clean launch still with readable headline space.

prompts.title: Visual research still
prompts.prompt: Create a grounded visual direction board image for a premium cycling helmet launch, current retail photography cues, neutral background, product-forward composition.

faqs.q: Is Luma Uni-1 an image model?
faqs.a: Yes. In MaxVideoAI this page describes still-image generation and image editing only.
Yes. Text requests can use multiple visual references, and edit requests use the first image as the source plus optional references.

faqs.q: How should I price a Uni-1 run?
faqs.a: Use the displayed MaxVideoAI quote. Public copy uses MaxVideoAI pricing with margin rather than promising lower provider costs.

faqs.q: Should I use Uni-1 or Uni-1 Max?
faqs.a: Use Uni-1 for exploration and reference preparation. Move to Uni-1 Max when a selected still needs higher fidelity or more careful revisions.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for 2K still images, source edits and reference-led layouts.
custom.heroDesc1: Uni-1 gives teams a focused Luma still-image route for concepts, source edits and reference preparation before committing to a higher-fidelity image pass or motion workflow.
custom.heroDesc2: It is most useful when the brief needs visual reasoning and reference roles, not when exact text perfection is the only success criterion.
heroHighlights: Image-only workflow||Use Uni-1 for still creation and edits, not direct motion generation.
Reference roles||Tell the model which reference controls product, layout, style or palette.
Web-grounded option||Use web search only when current visual context improves the brief.
Pricing context||Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing and the app confirms the final quote.
custom.specNote: Specs describe the public MaxVideoAI image workspace route.

specSections.title: Image workflows
items: Image edit with one source image.
Optional references for product, style, layout or palette.

specSections.title: Pricing behavior
items: Base image and reference costs follow MaxVideoAI display pricing.
MaxVideoAI display margin is reflected in public examples.
The exact app quote is authoritative before generation.
Direct-provider discounts are not promised in public copy.

custom.whatIntro1: Choose Uni-1 in the image workspace, then create a still from text or edit an uploaded source image.
custom.whatIntro2: Use references only when each image has a clear purpose.
whatFlowSteps: Choose Luma Uni-1 in the image workspace.
Inspect text and small details before using the result.
custom.galleryIntro: Use examples to plan source edits, product references and still-image handoffs.
strengths: Good for 2K concept stills and reference preparation.
Useful when the prompt needs visual layout reasoning.
References can reduce ambiguity when each one has a role.
boundaries: Exact text and small labels need manual review.
Web-grounded output still needs human verification.
Public pricing follows MaxVideoAI display pricing.
safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.
Do not include private personal data or sensitive documents.

relatedItems.title: Luma Uni-1 Max
relatedItems.description: Use Max when a selected still needs higher fidelity, product finish or more careful source-image revisions.

relatedItems.title: Luma Ray 3.2
relatedItems.description: Use Ray 3.2 when the selected still is ready to become a short cinematic motion test.

custom.finalPara1: Luma Uni-1 is the practical 2K image route for still creation, edits and reference prep in MaxVideoAI.

hero.title: Luma Uni-1
hero.subtitle: 2K image generation with image edits, multi-reference guidance, layout reasoning and optional web-grounded references.
hero.paragraph: Use Uni-1 for text-to-image, source-image edits, reference-led layouts and visual research stills when you need a thoughtful Luma image route without claiming perfect typography or guaranteed factual accuracy.

features.title: 2K stills
features.body: Create single 2K images for concepts, references and layout exploration.

features.title: Source edits
features.body: Use the first image as the edit source, then guide revisions with the prompt.

features.title: Multi-reference input
features.body: Attach references for product shape, style, typography direction or composition cues.

features.title: Layout reasoning
features.body: Useful for arranging visual elements, but exact text still needs review.

features.title: Web-grounded option
features.body: Use web search only when current visual context helps the still brief.

features.title: Display pricing
features.body: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing before generation.

decisionCards.title: When to choose Uni-1
decisionCards.body: Choose Uni-1 for 2K still concepts, source edits, reference preparation and visual layout exploration before a final image route.

decisionCards.title: How to use references
decisionCards.body: Give each reference a role: product shape, palette, layout, style or text hierarchy. Keep the prompt explicit about what to preserve.

decisionCards.title: When to move to Uni-1 Max
decisionCards.body: Move selected stills to Max when the hero asset needs higher-fidelity detail, product finish or more careful revisions.

referenceWorkflows.title: Text-to-image
referenceWorkflows.body: Describe the artifact, subject, layout, visual style, aspect ratio and any text that needs review.

referenceWorkflows.title: Source edit
referenceWorkflows.body: Upload one source image, then separate preserve instructions from changes.

referenceWorkflows.title: Multi-reference layout
referenceWorkflows.body: Use references to anchor subject, style, palette and composition instead of asking one prompt to carry everything.

referenceWorkflows.title: Web-grounded visual research
referenceWorkflows.body: Enable web search only when recent visual context is useful and still verify the result.

referenceWorkflows.title: Handoff to video
referenceWorkflows.body: Save the clearest still as a start image when the next step is motion in a video model.

pricingCopy.title: Luma Uni-1 pricing at a glance
pricingCopy.subtitle: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing; exact price appears before generation.
pricingCopy.footnote: Reference and edit examples include source/reference image counts where shown; final app quotes remain authoritative.

meta.title: Luma Uni-1: Image Pricing, References & Editing | MaxVideoAI
meta.description: Explore Luma Uni-1 2K image generation, source-image edits, multi-reference guidance, web-grounded visual research and MaxVideoAI pricing.

section.title: How to write a strong Uni-1 prompt
section.intro: Treat the prompt like a still-image creative brief: artifact, subject, layout, references and constraints.
section.tip: Tip: name the role of every reference image.

globalPrinciples: Keep one clear visual goal per request.
Separate preserve and change instructions for edits.
Use web search only when the brief needs current context.
engineWhy: Reference roles help the image route reason about layout and identity.
Reviewing typography keeps final assets conservative and production-safe.
A clean still can become stronger source material for later motion.

imageExamples.title: Luma Uni-1 image prompt examples
imageExamples.intro: Use these for campaign stills, typography posters, reference edits and 2K-to-4K finals.

items.title: Campaign still
items.prompt: 2K campaign still for an amber perfume bottle on white acrylic, soft studio key light, clean shadow, exact headline "AURA NOIRE" top-left, small logo lockup bottom edge.

items.title: Typography poster
items.prompt: Vertical 4K poster, premium editorial grid, graphite background, exact headline "MIDNIGHT LAUNCH", subhead "LIMITED DROP", crisp hierarchy, generous margins, readable text.

items.title: Reference edit
items.prompt: Using this product reference, keep the shape, logo and proportions. Change the scene to a midnight-blue studio, improve reflections, remove dust and fingerprints.

items.title: 2K to 4K final
items.prompt: Rerun the approved 2K composition as a 4K final. Sharpen fine details, keep typography identical, preserve brand colors, product position and the locked framing.
